who: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
offer: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in training and paperwork completion. We streamline onboarding instead of manual processes.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in training and paperwork completion.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding workflows
DM outreach to HR admins with demo video
Community forums for HR tool discussions
try_it: Let users try training notifications and onboarding alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Reduce steps needed in the onboarding process
